HomePageSEO.title: Code by {name}
HomePageSEO.description: Explore a collection of my software development projects showcasing my skills in modern web technologies.

ImprintPage.title: Imprint
ImprintPage.section3_title: Person responsible for content pursuant to § 18 Abs. 2 MStV
ImprintPage.disclaimer_links_content: This site contains links to external third-party websites over whose content I have no influence. I cannot assume liability for this external content. The respective provider or operator of those pages is always responsible for their content.
ImprintPage.disclaimer_copyright_content: The content and works on this website are subject to German copyright law. Reproduction, editing, distribution, or any exploitation beyond the limits of copyright law requires my written consent.

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.section1_content: This privacy policy informs you about the nature, scope, and purpose of the processing of personal data on our website.
PrivacyPage.section3_hosting_content: This website is self-hosted on a dedicated server by Dogado GmbH, Am Rahser Bahnhof 4, 41189 Mönchengladbach, Germany. The server may automatically record standard access log data (IP address, browser type, timestamp, requested URL) as part of normal server operation. This data is used solely for security and availability purposes and is not shared with third parties. The legal basis is Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR.
PrivacyPage.section3_tracking_content: This website uses Umami, an open-source, self-hosted analytics tool (analytics.joeldettinger.de). Umami does not use cookies and does not collect any personally identifiable information. Only anonymised data such as page views, referrers, and device type are recorded. The data is stored exclusively on my own server and is not shared with third parties. The legal basis is my legitimate interest in understanding aggregate website usage (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR).
PrivacyPage.section3_contact_content: When you use our contact form, the information provided is processed internally for the purpose of handling your request. This data is not passed to third parties. The processing is based on your consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR).
PrivacyPage.section4_title: 3. Your Rights as a Data Subject
PrivacyPage.section4_content: Within the framework of the applicable legal provisions, you have the right at any time to free information about your stored personal data, its origin and recipients, and the purpose of the data processing, and, if applicable, a right to correction or deletion of this data.
